creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223445
py-python-poppler-qt5-fix-packaging-with-py38.patch

Hi,

if built with PYTHON3_DEFAULT=3.8 the graphics/py-python-poppler-qt5 port fails to package due a slightly different name of the .so file. Attached is a patch that remedies the problem.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (12.2-RELEASE amd64 with PYTHON3_DEFAULT=3.7)
- poudriere -> OK (12.2-RELEASE amd64 with PYTHON3_DEFAULT=3.8)
